---
title: "ETC5513 Assignment 1"
author: "Shixu Xiao"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

## Introduction

This report analyses a weather dataset containing observations such as temperature and rainfall over time.  
The dataset is stored in the project’s data folder to support reproducible analysis.  
The objective of this report is to examine trends and variations in weather conditions.  
Such analysis helps provide insights into environmental patterns and potential climate variability.

## Research Question

This report investigates how weather conditions vary over time in the dataset.  
In particular, it examines patterns in temperature and rainfall observations.  
The analysis aims to identify whether there are noticeable trends or variability in these weather measures.
